text: Code reviews are an essential part of modern software development. When developers check each other's code before it is merged, they can catch bugs early, before the software reaches users. This saves time and money in the long run. Beyond finding errors, code reviews also promote knowledge sharing within the team. Junior developers learn from more experienced colleagues, and everyone stays informed about different parts of the project. Moreover, consistent code reviews help maintain high team quality by encouraging clear, readable, and well-structured code. Ultimately, they build a stronger, more collaborative engineering culture.
